objects.name: Falcon AIDR Detects Threats at the Prompt Layer in Kubernetes AI Applications
objects.description: Thousands of schools around the US were paralyzed on Thursday after education tech firm Instructure shut down access to its Canvas platform following a breach by hackers going by the name ShinyHunters.
